callGraph.callee:
components
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ImportPath))
            .GroupBy(x => x.Name, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(g => g.First())
            .OrderBy(x => x.Name, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(x => $"import {x.Name} from \"{x.ImportPath}\";")
            .ToList

components
            .Where(x => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x.ImportPath))
            .GroupBy(x => x.Name, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(g => g.First())
            .OrderBy(x => x.Name, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select

byKind.Values
            .Where(c => string.Equals(c.Slot, "body", StringComparison.Ordinal))
            .OrderBy(c => c.Weight)
            .ThenBy(c => c.Kind, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .ToList

ordered
            .Select(c => SectionCatalog.FindByComponentName(c.Name) ?? SectionCatalog.AnyOfKind(c.Kind))
            .Where(d => d is not null)
            .Cast<SectionDefinition>()
            .ToList

components

            .Where(x => x is not null)
            .Cast<SectionDefinition>()
            .GroupBy(x => x.ComponentName, StringComparer.Ordinal)
            .Select(g => g.First())
